spec.expr:
quantile_over_time(0.75,
  {job="faro-web"} | json | kind="measurement" | type="web-vitals"
  | value_ttfb != "" | unwrap value_ttfb [$__range]
) by ()

quantile_over_time(0.75,
  {job="faro-web"} | json | kind="measurement" | type="web-vitals"
  | value_cls != "" | unwrap value_cls [$__auto]
) by ()

quantile_over_time(0.75,
  {job="faro-web"} | json | kind="measurement" | type="web-vitals"
  | value_inp != "" | unwrap value_inp [$__auto]
) by ()
sum(count_over_time({job="faro-web"} | json | kind=`exception` [$__interval]))

sum(count_over_time(
  {job="faro-web"} | json | kind="event"
  | event_name=~`faro\.tracing\.fetch|faro\.tracing\.xml-http-request`
  | event_data_http_status_code != ""
  [$__range]
))
topk(10, sum by(page_url, page_id, context_status) (count_over_time({job="faro-web"} | json | kind=`exception` | type=`http-status` | context_status =~ `^(0|[45]\d\d)$` [$__range])))
sum(count_over_time({job="faro-web"} | json | kind=`exception` | type!=`http-status` [$__range]))
sum(count_over_time({job="faro-web"} | json | kind=`exception` | type!=`http-status` [$__interval]))
topk(10, sum by(value) (count_over_time({job="faro-web"} | json | kind=`exception` | type!=`http-status` [$__range])))

quantile_over_time(0.75,
  {job="faro-web"} | json | kind="measurement" | type="web-vitals"
  | value_lcp != "" | unwrap value_lcp [$__range]
) by ()
topk(10, sum by(page_url) (count_over_time({job="faro-web"} | json | kind=`exception` | type!=`http-status` [$__range])))
topk(10, sum by(browser_name, browser_version) (count_over_time({job="faro-web"} | json | kind=`exception` | type!=`http-status` [$__range])))
topk(10, sum by(event_name) (count_over_time({job="faro-web"} | json | kind=`event` [$__range])))
topk(10, sum by(browser_name, browser_version) (count_over_time({job="faro-web"} | json | kind=`exception` | type!=`http-status` [$__range])))

spec.title: Slow User Journey (As per user defined)

spec.expr:
{job="faro-web"}
  | json
  | kind=`event`
  | event_name=~`session_start|session_resume|session_extend`
  | session_id != ``
  | page_id =~ `$page_id`

sum(count_over_time(
  {job="faro-web"} | json | kind="event"
  |  event_name=~`faro\.tracing\.fetch|faro\.tracing\.xml-http-request`
  | event_data_http_status_code != ""
  [$__range]
))

quantile_over_time(0.75,
  {job="faro-web"} | json | kind="measurement" | type="web-vitals"
  | value_fcp != "" | unwrap value_fcp [$__range]
) by ()
sum(count_over_time({job="faro-web"} | json | kind=`exception` | type=`http-status` | context_status =~ `^(0|[45]\d\d)$` [$__range]))

sum(count_over_time({job="faro-web"} | json | kind=`exception` | type=`http-status` | context_status =~ `^(0|[45]\d\d)$` [$__range]))
/
sum(count_over_time({job="faro-web"} | json | kind=`event` | event_name=~`faro\.tracing\.fetch|faro\.tracing\.xml-http-request` [$__range]))
* 100

) by ()
